en_title: Pokémon Winds and Waves Starter Creatures May Debut First in Pokémon Go, Fans Believe
cn_title: 《宝可梦 风与波》初始宝可梦或在《宝可梦Go》中抢先登场
subtitle: GO先行？
opus_summary: 粉丝根据数据挖掘推测，《宝可梦 风与波》的三只初始宝可梦可能先于2027年主线在《宝可梦Go》中出场。尽管有美录坦等先例，但初始宝可梦在主线前实装前所未有。目前《宝可梦Go》正筹备10周年GO Fest活动。

paragraphs.en: Fans may not have to wait until 2027 for the debut of Pokémon Winds and Waves' lovable starter Pokémon.
paragraphs.cn: 粉丝们可能不必等到2027年才能见到《宝可梦 风与波》中可爱的初始宝可梦登场。

paragraphs.en: The Gen 10 trio — monobrowed Grass-type bird Browt, flame-furred Fire-type dog Pombon and sneaky-looking Water-type lizard Gecqua — were all revealed at the end of the first Pokémon Winds and Pokémon Waves trailer .
paragraphs.cn: 第十世代的三只宝可梦——一字眉草系小鸟Browt、火焰毛的火系小狗Pombon和鬼祟模样的水系蜥蜴Gecqua——都在首支《宝可梦 风与波》预告片结尾亮相。

paragraphs.en: That same trailer also confirmed Pokémon's long-awaited 10th generation of games will debut on Nintendo Switch 2 in 2027 — meaning a long wait still for the critters to fully arrive. But eagle-eyed Pokémon Go fans now believe the wait for Browt, Pombon, and Gecqua may actually be shorter than first expected.
paragraphs.cn: 同一支预告也确认了宝可梦备受期待的第10代游戏将于2027年在任天堂Switch 2上登场，意味着这些小生物要全面亮相还得等很久。但眼尖的《宝可梦Go》粉丝现在相信，Browt、Pombon和Gecqua的登场时间可能比最初预想的要短。

paragraphs.en: According to a thread on top Pokémon Go fan reddit TheSilphRoad, datamining has sniffed out the first suggestion of the new starter creatures joining the game in the future, alongside content for other upcoming events.
paragraphs.cn: 根据顶级《宝可梦Go》粉丝Reddit社区TheSilphRoad上的一个帖子，数据挖掘已经嗅探到这些新的初始宝可梦未来加入游戏的第一条线索，同时还有其它即将到来活动的内容。

paragraphs.en: Of course, these creatures were always destined to arrive in Pokémon Go at some point — the hit smartphone game now hosts the vast majority of species, and previous new generation launches have seen their creatures turn up in Pokémon Go around the same time, to promote their arrival. But this would be very early for data on the three species to be added — especially if Pokémon Winds and Waves don't launch until late 2027.
paragraphs.cn: 当然，这些宝可梦迟早会登陆《宝可梦Go》——这款热门手机游戏现已收录了绝大多数种类，而此前新世代发售时，宝可梦也会差不多同时期在《宝可梦Go》出现，为它们的到来造势。但这次关于三种宝可梦的数据这么早就加入，会是非常早的——尤其是如果《宝可梦 风与波》要到2027年底才发售。

paragraphs.en: The mere suggestion that the three could debut in Pokémon Go much sooner would be a huge deal for the game, and for the Pokémon franchise. The evergreen Pokémon Go still welcomes millions of players daily and is celebrating its 10-year anniversary this summer — so it would be the perfect stage on which to fully debut the new creatures. Still, new starter Pokémon have never previously become obtainable before their associated mainline games' launch.
paragraphs.cn: 仅仅是有迹象表明这三只宝可梦可能更快在《宝可梦Go》中登场，对这款游戏以及宝可梦系列来说都将是一件大事。常青的《宝可梦Go》每天仍吸引着数百万玩家，今年夏天还将庆祝10周年——因此，这将是新宝可梦全面亮相的完美舞台。不过，此前从未有过初始宝可梦在相关主线游戏发售前就能获取的先例。

paragraphs.en: All of that said, Pokémon Go has led the charge on debuting a couple of new Pokémon species before — so this wouldn't be entirely unprecedented. Meltan memorably popped up in-game via a stunning and bewildering debut, suddenly in people's hands before anyone knew what was going on. Roaming Form Gimmighoul also debuted in Pokémon Go.
paragraphs.cn: 话虽如此，《宝可梦Go》此前也曾率先首发过几种新宝可梦——因此这并非完全没有先例。美录坦就曾以令人震惊和困惑的方式首次出现在游戏中，在大家还没搞清楚状况时就突然来到玩家手中。走路形态的索财灵也是在《宝可梦Go》中首发的。

paragraphs.en: How soon could the trio arrive? For now, Pokémon Go is busy building to its biggest annual in-game event, Go Fest Global 2026, which this year will take place on July 11 and 12. Featuring the wide debut of Mega Mewtwo, the game's big weekend will this year be free to access for all players in celebration of Pokémon Go's 10-year anniversary, meaning no paying extra to access its questlines or boosted Shiny chances. After all of that, though, fans will hope the trio aren't too far behind.
paragraphs.cn: 这三只宝可梦到底多快会到来？目前，《宝可梦Go》正忙于筹备其一年一度最大的游戏内活动——2026全球GO Fest，今年将于7月11日和12日举行。这次活动将以超级超梦的广泛登场为特色，这款游戏的盛大周末今年将对所有玩家免费开放，以庆祝《宝可梦Go》10周年，这意味着无需额外付费就能参与任务线或提高闪光概率。不过，在那之后，粉丝们希望这三只宝可梦不会等太久。

paragraphs.en: Tom Phillips is IGN's News Editor. You can reach Tom at tom_phillips@ign.com or find him on Bluesky
